summary: Iteration 85: Avatar Edit History Persistence Feature - All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI verified: history panel shows correctly when avatar has 2+ entries, base entry has NO delete button, non-base entries have download/edit/delete buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: AvatarIn model correctly includes edit_history: Optional[list] = None
Backend: upsert_avatar correctly persists edit_history to Supabase JSONB
Backend: delete_avatar_history_entry correctly validates avatar_id (404) and entry_index (400)
Frontend: History panel correctly shows only when avatarEditHistory.length > 1
Frontend: Base entry (isBase=true) correctly has NO delete button per line 1992-2013
Frontend: Non-base entries have download, edit, and delete buttons on hover
seed_data_creation: Test avatars created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests, cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar edit_history persistence feature is fully working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/data/avatars (with edit_history field), GET /api/data/avatars (returns edit_history), DELETE /api/data/avatars/{avatar_id}/history/{entry_index}. Frontend: History panel shows in avatar edit modal when avatarEditHistory.length > 1. Avatar with id 1774141177717 has 2 history entries and can be used for testing. Base entries (isBase=true) do NOT show delete button.

POST_avatars_with_edit_history.details: edit_history array persists correctly to Supabase JSONB

GET_avatars_returns_edit_history.details: All avatars return their edit_history arrays

DELETE_history_entry_success.details: Deletes specific entry by index, returns updated history

frontend_base_entry_no_delete.details: Base entry (isBase=true) correctly has NO delete button

frontend_action_buttons.details: Download, edit, delete buttons appear on hover for non-base entries
